programme.desc: Stranded in an Outback town, a down-on-his-luck TV star forms an unlikely friendship with a spirited young Indigenous girl when they team up to rescue orphaned joeys. Based on a heart-warming true story.

programme.title: Anchors Up
programme.desc: After pulling off a daring rescue, a young boat is recruited by a larger harbour. However, he soon realises that bigger is not always better.

programme.title: My Freaky Family
programme.desc: On the cusp of her 13th birthday, Betty just wants to fit in with her magical, musical family. But there&amp;apos;s a lot that she doesn&amp;apos;t yet know.

programme.title: Monster Family
